name: NodeGoat A7 — admin benefits route reachable without a server-side role check

provenance.note: Both sides verbatim-real: NodeGoat master registers the benefits routes with only isLoggedIn (no isAdmin) live, and ships the documented role-guarded form (isLoggedIn, isAdmin) as an adjacent commented 'Fix for A7' block. Diff inverts the documented fix.

notes: Coverage gap closed by new rule B-19 (missing function-level authz, CWE-862), distinct from IDOR. NodeGoat A7 Missing Function Level Access Control.
